fixes:
- Player track specifies pose_07.mp4 with loop=true, but pose files are video clips that should not loop indefinitely — player should be static or have defined loop_segment_ms.

- Mission text visible 800-4500ms = 3700ms duration, which is within acceptable range but on the longer side for readability — verify Hebrew text length fits comfortably.
